.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add source code and configuration files to the image for the build step.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process needs access to the source code and pom.xml to compile the application.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add a Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application needs to be built into a JAR file to be executed by the entrypoint.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the entrypoint from a generic bash shell to executing the specific application JAR.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container should run the application directly rather than dropping into a shell, ensuring the service starts as intended.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default syntax.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.why_exists: Storybook 7+ and modern tooling chains often default to or require ESM; using module.exports may cause resolution errors or deprecation warnings in ESM-first environments.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add @storybook/addon-onboarding to the addons list for improved developer experience.
Add @chromatic-com/storybook addon for visual regression testing integration.
Add @storybook/addon-interactions to the addons list for interaction testing support.
Explicitly define the framework as @storybook/react-webpack5, replacing implicit configuration.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Remove custom webpack plugin WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning and its associated webpackFinal configuration.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: const WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning = require("./webpack-plugin-fail-build-on-warning"); ... webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the host.
Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Update baseUrl path to remove leading slash for better module resolution compatibility.
Add include directive to explicitly scope the configuration to the src directory.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0 for better compatibility with modern build tools.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration to the build process.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for service virtualization in tests.
Refactor pom.xml structure with comments and organized sections for better readability.
Add Maven Surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Add Maven Jar plugin configuration to ensure executable JAR generation.
Add new Maven profiles (wiremock, integration) for different testing environments.
